allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\(''typescript''\); const cfg = ts.readConfigFile\(''tsconfig.json'', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(cfg.config, ts.sys, ''.''\); const prog = ts.createProgram\(parsed.fileNames, parsed.options\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(prog\); diags.forEach\(d => { if\(d.file && d.file.fileName.includes\(''htmlExportGenerator''\)\) { const {line} = d.file.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start\); console.log\(d.file.fileName + '':'' + \(line+1\) + '' '' + ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, ''\\n''\)\); }}\); if\(diags.filter\(d=>d.file&&d.file.fileName.includes\(''htmlExportGenerator''\)\).length===0\) console.log\(''No errors in htmlExportGenerator''\);")

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\(''typescript''\); const cfg = ts.readConfigFile\(''tsconfig.json'', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(cfg.config, ts.sys, ''.''\); const prog = ts.createProgram\(parsed.fileNames, parsed.options\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(prog\); diags.forEach\(d => { if\(d.file && d.file.fileName.includes\(''exportService''\)\) { const {line} = d.file.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start\); console.log\(d.file.fileName + '':'' + \(line+1\) + '' '' + ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, ''\\n''\)\); }}\); if\(diags.filter\(d=>d.file&&d.file.fileName.includes\(''exportService''\)\).length===0\) console.log\(''No errors in exportService''\);")
